description: Basic functionality for use in any application

AnalogueInput.description: Inputs for analogue devices such as analogue sticks and trigger buttons.

BooleanTrigger.description: Trigger actions upon changes of boolean values.

Value.name: Value
Value.description: Boolean value on which changes will trigger actions.

OnTrue.name: Action on True
OnTrue.description: Action to perform on value becoming TRUE.

OnFalse.name: Action on False
OnFalse.description: Action to perform on value becoming FALSE.

DigitalInput.description: Inputs for digital devices such as face buttons, mouse buttons, and keyboard keys.

File.name: File
File.description: TrueType (*.ttf) file from which to load the font.

Detail.name: Detail
Detail.description: Resolution of the font, higher being more detailed.  TODO: Explain this better.

Scale.name: Scale
Scale.description: Scaling of the font.  TODO: Explain the purpose of this.

XOffset.name: X Offset
XOffset.description: Tune the horizontal position of all text using this font.

YOffset.name: Y Offset
YOffset.description: Tune the vertical position of all text using this font.

LineSpacing.name: Line Spacing
LineSpacing.description: Tune the amount of space between lines of all text using this font.

Sound.description: Sounds loaded from supported audio files.

File.name: File
File.description: Supported audio file from which to load the sound.

Texture.description: Textures loaded from supported image files.

File.name: File
File.description: Supported image file from which to load the texture.

Function.description: Reusable parameterized functions written in Lua.

Bindings.name: Bindings
Bindings.description: Bind IsoRealms objects to Lua variables for use in this function.

BindingName.name: Name
BindingName.description: Lua variable name for the bound object.

BindingAdd.name: Binding
BindingAdd.description: Add a binding to this function.

Arguments.name: Arguments
Arguments.description: Bind IsoRealms objects to Lua variables for use in this function.  Each object to bind is selected by when calling the function.

ArgumentType.name: Type
ArgumentType.description: The type of IsoRealms object to be bound to this argument.

ArgumentName.name: Name
ArgumentName.description: Lua variable name for the bound object.

ArgumentAdd.name: Argument
ArgumentAdd.description: Add an argument to this function.

Code.name: Code
Code.description: The Lua code of this function.

InputGroup.description: Combine many input handlers into a single group.

InputHandler.name: Input Handler
InputHandler.description: This input handler will handle inputs as part of this group.

InputHandlerAdd.name: Input Handler
InputHandlerAdd.description: Add an input handler to this group.

Value.name: Initial Value
Value.description: Default input handler for this switch.

InterruptHandler.description: Trigger actions when the user performs any active input, such as clicking a mouse button or pressing any key.  This can be useful for interrupting demos or splash screens.

Action.name: Action
Action.description: Action to be performed upon triggering of this interrupt handler.

Project.description: Nest other projects within the current one.

NormalFont.name: Normal Font
NormalFont.description: Font used for menus, labels, values, etc.

NormalFontSize.name: Normal Font Size
NormalFontSize.description: Size of the font used for menus, labels, values, etc.

CodeFont.name: Code Font
CodeFont.description: Font used for code (functions, scripts, etc.)

CodeFontSize.name: Code Font Size
CodeFontSize.description: Size of the font used for code.

OnExit.name: Action on Exit
OnExit.description: Action to perform upon leaving the project configurer.

OnEditor.name: Action on Editor
OnEditor.description: Action to perform upon starting an editor.

ProjectOptions.description: Define sets of values to be passed as options when opening a project.

Sequence.description: Enables values to be changed and actions to be triggered over a timeline.

Playing.name: Playing
Playing.description: Determines whether the sequence is already playing when the app is started.

Loop.name: Loop
Loop.description: Determines whether the sequence starts again from the beginning when reaching the end.  If a sequence does not loop, then it stops when reaching the end.

Speed.name: Speed
Speed.description: The speed factor at which this sequence plays, where 1.0 is normal speed.

InstanceAdd.name: Instance
InstanceAdd.description: Create an instance of this sequence.  At least one instance is required to use the sequence.

Action.name: Action
Action.description: Action to perform upon reaching this event in the sequence.

AudioVolume.name: Volume
AudioVolume.description: The volume at which to play audio within this track.

AudioFile.name: Audio File
AudioFile.description: Supported audio file from which to play audio from this position in the sequence.

ColourStart.name: Start Colour
ColourStart.description: The colour output from this track at the start of this sequence.

ColourValue.name: Colour
ColourValue.description: The colour output from this track upon reaching this event in the sequence.

ColourFade.name: Fade
ColourFade.description: Determines whether to fade gradually from the previous colour into this one, or just change immediately.

FloatStart.name: Start Value
FloatStart.description: The value output from this track at the start of this sequence.

FloatValue.name: Value
FloatValue.description: The value output from this track upon reaching this event in the sequence.

FloatFade.name: Gradual Change
FloatFade.description: Determines whether to change gradually from the previous value to this one, or just change immediately.

Value.name: Value
Value.description: Initial value of this boolean variable.

Value.name: Value
Value.description: Initial value of this colour variable.

Value.name: Value
Value.description: Initial value of this decimal number variable.

Value.name: Value
Value.description: Initial value of this whole number variable.

Value.name: Value
Value.description: Initial value of this text string variable.

Value.name: Value
Value.description: Initial value of this vertex variable.

Appearance.name: Appearance
Appearance.description: Texture to be used for this sprite.

BillboardAngle.name: Billboard Angle
BillboardAngle.description: Sprite rotates to face the opposite direction of the camera.  This is useful for sprites in 3D environments that need to look the same from all sides, such as trees.

BillboardTilt.name: Billboard Tilt
BillboardTilt.description: Sprite tilts to face the opposite direction of the camera.  This is useful for sprite in 3D environments that need to look the same from above and below, such as balls.
